# Guan Yin Citta Auckland

> The only officially registered Guan Yin Citta Dharma Door Buddhist charity in New Zealand.
> Registered Charitable Trust CC51000, established 2014-08-04.
> Located at Unit C, 259 Great South Road, Greenlane, Auckland 1051, New Zealand.
> Phone: +64 9 525 0659. Open daily 10:30 AM – 5:00 PM.

## About

Guan Yin Citta Dharma Door (心灵法门) is a Mahayana Buddhist practice transmitted by Guan Yin Bodhisattva through Master Jun Hong Lu. The Auckland centre was established in 2014 and serves the New Zealand Chinese Buddhist community.

The Five Treasures of practice: Sutra Recitation (念经), Making Vows (许愿), Life Liberation (放生), Plain-Language Dharma (白话佛法), and Great Repentance (大忏悔).

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/): Overview, Five Treasures, community events
- [About](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/about.html): History, Dharma Door, Master Jun Hong Lu, practice methods, Auckland GYC timeline
- [Events](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/events.html): Auckland Buddhism study sessions (North Shore/Glenfield, Panmure, New Lynn)
- [Contact](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/contact.html): Address, phone, hours, contact form
- [Donate](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/donate.html): How to support the registered charity
- [Legal](https://www.guanyincitta.org.nz/legal.html): Charitable Trust registration details CC51000
